extendedProperties.descriptionOfChanges: ["SKU Availability: Geo-replication is only available on specific Azure Container Registry SKUs. Customers may need to use a supported SKU to enable this feature.","Additional Regional Replicas: Each replica deploys the registry service in an additional region, increasing overall service cost based on the number of regions configured.","Total Registry Storage Size: Images are replicated to each region, but storage is billed based on the total logical registry size, not per replica. For example: a 1 GB image replicated to two regions still counts as 1 GB of storage.","Cross-Region Replication Traffic: Pushing images may generate cross-region data transfer as layers are replicated between regions.","Network Egress for Pulls: Image pulls may incur data egress charges depending on the network path between workloads and the registry replica."]
